helpfulness.description: How useful is this review to a potential buyer making a purchase decision?

indicators.high: Specific details about usage duration, measurable outcomes, comparisons to alternatives, practical tips
indicators.medium: General impressions with some specifics, mentions pros and cons
indicators.low: Vague opinions, no actionable information, pure emotion without substance

specificity.description: Does the review contain concrete, verifiable details rather than generic statements?

indicators.high: Exact measurements, timeframes, model comparisons, specific use cases described
indicators.medium: Some details but mixed with generic statements
indicators.low: All generic praise or complaints, no specific evidence

authenticity.description: Does this appear to be a genuine review from a real user with actual experience?

indicators.high: Balanced perspective, mentions both positives and negatives, describes real usage scenarios
indicators.medium: Mostly one-sided but contains some authentic details
indicators.low: Suspiciously perfect or entirely negative, generic language, no evidence of actual use
